title: Software Update - Headset and all other components are up to date - UI
scenario: Verify Software Update tab displays "up to date" status with correct device entries, images, names, messages, and firmware versions for single headsets, headsets with charge stand, and earbuds with charge case.
steps: Open the Software Update tab in the application.
Check the display for a single headset connected.
Verify that a single entry is shown with: device image, device name, 'Your Headset is Up To Date' message, and current firmware version.
Check the display for a headset with a charge stand connected.
Verify that two entries are shown (headset and stand), each with: device image, device name, appropriate 'up to date' message, and current firmware version.
Check the display for earbuds with a charge case connected.
Verify that two entries are shown (earbuds and case), each with: device image, device name, appropriate 'up to date' message, and current firmware version.
expected: The Software Update tab displays 'up to date' status for all connected components. Single headsets show one entry with device image, name, 'Your Headset is Up To Date' message, and current firmware version. Headsets with charge stand show two entries (headset and stand) each with device image, name, appropriate 'up to date' message, and current firmware. Earbuds with charge case show two entries (earbuds and case) each with device image, name, appropriate 'up to date' message, and current firmware.
